scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @radar/api" "npm run dev -w @radar/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @radar/api && npm run build -w @radar/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @radar/api && npm run test -w @radar/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @radar/api && npm run lint -w @radar/web
